The current monitoring plan computes PSI weekly for key numerical and categorical features, replacing the obsolete monthly‑accuracy‑only plan.
The old monitoring plan was a monthly‑accuracy‑only plan that checked model accuracy only once per month.
PSI was added to monitor data drift on key numerical and categorical features, enabling the system to detect drift and trigger retraining when the PSI exceeds the alert threshold.
Retraining should be triggered when the PSI crosses the alert threshold for two consecutive checks.
The v0 dashboard should display the drift status, the last check time, and whether retraining is recommended.
